rationale: Assesses an AI agent's ability to correctly move a complete level-3 Markdown subsection from one level-2 section to another, preserving all owned content and ignoring irrelevant archives or quotes.

scorer_policy: The 'User Feedback Collection' subsection must be moved intact, preserving all owned content, to the correct location in the 'Beta Testing' section. The archived heading text in the code block must be ignored. All other content must remain unchanged.
raw_response_notes: The generator returned valid JSON but used a generic slug/name, omitted the requested similarly named decoy heading, omitted a table in the moved subsection, and put the literal moved heading text in a fenced block without the Markdown heading marker.
The normalized fixture keeps the product-launch feedback theme while adding the required decoy, table, and exact fenced heading mention before realism review and measurement.
